hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "BEFORE STOPPING — doc sync check: Did you change any non-documentation files this session (source code, configs, scripts, commands)? If yes, verify these docs still reflect reality and update them if not:
- AGENTS.md — commands, hard rules, monorepo map
- docs/architecture/ — system structure or data flow
- docs/guides/ — how-to recipes
- docs/GLOSSARY.md — domain terms or invariants
If the docs are already up to date, or you only changed docs this session, stop immediately without further edits."}}'
